{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Path of the Chainkeeper
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Path of the Chainkeeper]] is a path associated with the [[Goldsign]] seen on [[Akura Justice]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Path of the Chainkeeper]] involves techniques that use force and shadow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
